title: Humane Rat Trap, RatzFatz Mouse Trap for Indoor & Outdoor, Effective Rat Cage Trap, No Kill, No Harm, Reusable Live Catch Mousetrap Poison Substitute, Large 30 cm, Suitable for Mice Squirrel
features: Animal-friendly, versatile, cruelty-free – the most efficient multi-catch trap by RatzFatz for different animals including
voles, hamsters, guinea pigs, rabbits, mice, rats etc. It is hygienic and does not use chemicals. Developed in Germany. Size 31.5 x 13 x 13 cm.
Durable – extra robust and weatherproof stainless steel, which is ideally suited for multiple use and for pest control, and even without maintenance can be used constantly; extra strong wire mesh.
2-in-1 rodent control – suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
Bait station, ideal for use of long-term bait, portion bait, natural bait, vegetables and other similar kinds of bait.
Easily to use and highly efficient – simply insert the packet and the trap is immediately ready to catch animals with high efficiency; narrow mesh width – easy to clean.
Risk-free warranty – 1-year money-back guarantee, and a professional customer service ready to help you.
description: Product Description Do you want to efficiently catch escaping mice or other pests, but don't want to hurt them unnecessarily? With our RatzFatz humane traps, you can efficiently capture animals without hurting or killing them. Our traps are designed to be animal-friendly. The traps are for indoor and outdoor use and they are suitable for most rodents with large space. In addition, no harmful chemicals are used in our traps - Which is unfortunately common practice in most traps. These harmful additives not only harm the captured animals but also your own pets and even humans. Benefits & Features Enough space - Suitable for most animals Reusable - An economical way to capture rodents Effective - The anti-escape mechanism ensures effective capture of animals For indoor and outdoor - Suitable for all weather conditions About RatzFatz RatzFatz was developed in Hamburg and has always been working on developing a better humane solution to deal with the animals which people would say: "troublemakers" or "pests". Our goal is - Catch animals quickly with RatzFatz without ever hurting them! RatzFatz Humane Rat Trap - Model: "Quick-Catch" A humane way to capture small animals efficiently without harming them. The innovative anti-escape mechanism ensures that the caught animals will not escape. The specially designed mesh ensures that the caught animals can breathe freely and will not hurt their paws. Suitable for: ＊Mice ＊Rats ＊Birds ＊Other animals with similar size Product Size: 32×13×13 cm Easy to set up Step 1: Pull up the door locking bar to the top, press the "V" shaped bar to hold the door open. (Figure 1) Step 2: Put the bait (cheese, butter, peanut, etc.) into the trap. (Figure 4) Step 3: Secure the trap by pressing down the button (on the left side). (Figure 2 and Figure 3) Step 4: Place the trap in areas where rodents often appear. Benefits & Features Reusable Adjustable Sensitivity Anti-escape design Suitable for all weather conditions Multi-Catch Animal friendly Easy to clean with disinfectant spray RatzFatz Mousetrap "Quickcatch" RatzFatz Mousetrap "Quickcatch" RatzFatz Mousetrap ''Trapstar'' RatzFatz Mousetrap ''Trapstar'' RatzFatz Mousetrap ''Trapstar'' RatzFatz Mousetrap ''Trapstar'' Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 5,938 4.1 out of 5 stars 3,434 — — 4.3 out of 5 stars 566 — Price £39.99 £ 39 . 99 £33.29 £ 33 . 29 — no data — no data — no data — no data Corrosion-resistant ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Size Big Big Small (S) Small (S) Small (S) Small (S) Capture type Rats, mice Small rats, mice Mice Mice Mice Mice Reusable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
